comment: "I found the practical explanations and case-based scenarios very interesting. The course helped me understand surgical and patient care procedures better."
"I have recommended this course to my friends because asides from being engaging, impactful, educational and all round interesting, I think it is something we can relate to as nurses."
"I loved learning about the different responsibilities as a nurse."
"I really enjoyed learning about perioperative care and advocacy."
"I found the modules on surgical asepsis, patient positioning, and intraoperative communication particularly engaging."
